selected.title: Family of Man
selected.desc: Herbert Bayer's modernist vision: a world of free individuals making their own story from photographs.
selected.quote: The individual would make their own story out of the photographs.

selected.title: Individual Self
selected.desc: At the center of that world is the individual self, making their own story.
selected.quote: At the center is the individual self.

selected.title: Unreal Fairyland
selected.desc: The world most Americans lived in concealed the harsh reality of power.
selected.quote: We're not being taught to deal with the world as it is.

selected.title: Crack Epidemic
selected.desc: Crack swept through black communities, and Afeni Shakur finally gave up, becoming addicted.
selected.quote: Then crack swept through the black communities of America.
